narrative:
Union South/West (precinct in Fayette County) has 1,054 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.3 percentage points.
